purpose: Block semantic strategy compile runs unless a candidate strategy is inspected and promoted through explicit authority posture, trace, and projection-boundary checks.
passConditions: strategy candidate is captured before promotion
provider evidence is receipted before candidate hardening
strategy plan answers story, strategy, manifest, receipt, and SOG ownership trace questions
hardening receipt records accepted claims and blockers
completionPosture: Agents may propose strategy, but only a hardened semantic strategy plan may authorize artifact projection.
